title: Credits
beat: Credits — comic splash, not a lore plate
artPrompt: Western fantasy COMIC BOOK splash page, single full-bleed painted scene, clear gutters none needed. Warm dusk workshop of Riftwild Commons: timber desk, cyan rift-ink, rolled Fracture maps, amber lantern light. Young Keeper Mira Eggwarden (practical robes, egg-care satchel) leans over a map while a leafy fox-like Bramblefox sits on the bench — BOTH integrated in the SAME scene, not floating card insets. Leave soft empty mid-page band for credit lettering. Painterly fantasy comic, earth tones, cyan accent only. Original Riftwilds IP. NO readable text, logos, watermarks, UI, credit boxes, floating portrait cards, collage overlays, or artbook insets.

lines.text: For Keepers who chose care first.
